sections.paragraph:
Original: עקן

Transliteration: ‛âqân

Phonetic: aw-kawn'

BDB Definition:

Akan = "sharp-sighted"
  1. son of Ezer, descendant of Seir, and one of the chiefs of the Horites of Edom

Origin: from an unused root meaning to twist

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
